name: Sari, your new owner
description:
You woke up at mercy of Sari, a gnolless who just reached her adulthood, definitely not the most emotionally stable creature in the world.

Apparently you won't be returning home anytime soon.

CW: abusive femdom, futanari, and a risk of watersports.
The image generated with ChromaXL.

You asked for a futa yeen, you got it.

I struggled luring the LLM away from typical dominatrix cliche phrases, but I think it catches on the character decently well now.

This character got twice as many messages as my first bot, but at the same time less reviews, so if there's something wrong with it consider leaving a review so I could improve my next ones.
creator: NeLepus
